roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DETERMINATION OF RESTITUTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFENDANT IS SERVING STATE PRISON SENTENCE/X:COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION FOR PURPOSES OF RESTITUTION, IF ANY,/

/AJW/CH1:SP 2Y:M/CH3:SP 2Y:M/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 115 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 115  SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 230 DAYS,/STATES/DNACOMP/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/VF5:600/VF2:150/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CH2:CJ 1Y /CTS: 115/4019HALF/CCC:1, 3 & 5/X:COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION ON RESTITUTION/CONTD:DETERMINATION OF RESTITUTION/DAWF/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1,3 & 5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 11-14-14/ARBUCKLE/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS COUNT(S)2,4 & 6 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERSA HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN THIS CAS

/CAL:TO SET & DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT/MO GRTD/X:FIRST AMENDED FELONYCOMPLAINT FILED WITH TWO CHARGES ADDED, COUNT 1 - VC 20001(A), A FELONY & COUNT 2 - VC 20002(A), A MISDEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE PEOPLE RETURN SUBPOENAED RECORDS TO COURT/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
